name: hope
description: Understand GitHub pull request changes before merge through explanation, a quiz, and an interactive review.

interface.shortDescription: Understand pull requests through active review
interface.longDescription: Turn an exact GitHub pull request snapshot into one safe offline review with visual explanation, a literate diff, an auto-scored quiz, and an optional interactive microworld.
defaultPrompt: Use $hope:diff with a GitHub pull request URL to create a visual, interactive change review.
